✴️ Crypto.news: Mining pool SpiderPool mined an empty Bitcoin block at height 954,352, which contained only the miner's reward without user transactions. The appearance of such blocks may be related to rapid block intervals

#BTC #mining #crypto

tweets.author: cryptovka.ru
tweets.text:
✴️ Crypto.news: Майнинг-пул SpiderPool добыл пустой блок Bitcoin на высоте 954 352, который содержал только вознаграждение майнера без пользовательских транзакций. Появление таких блоков может быть связано с быстрыми интервалами между блоками

#BTC #майнинг #crypto

tweets.author: cryptofox.news
tweets.text: SpiderPool mined an empty Bitcoin block (954,352) on June 19, containing only the Coinbase transaction. This can happen with rapid block intervals as miners prioritize speed. While rare now, it's not a network issue unless repeated. #Bitcoin #Mining

tweets.author: cryptonews-poster.bsky.social
tweets.text:
SpiderPool mined an empty Bitcoin block (height 954,352) on June 19th. This means it only had the miner reward, no user txns. Likely a speed tactic by the pool. Empty blocks are rare now but not a network issue. A pattern of empty blocks would be more noteworthy.

#crypto #blockc
